job_description:
2026TD450980 - Chuyên viên cao cấp Bảo mật dữ liệu - Khối Dữ liệu
1. Mục tiêu công việc:
Thực hiện các hoạt động liên quan đến xây dựng và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu, đảm bảo an toàn, tuân thủ và bảo vệ dữ liệu trong suốt vòng đời, theo quy định pháp luật và tiêu chuẩn quốc tế (Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP, ISO 27001, GDPR...).
Phối hợp với các đơn vị Quản trị dữ liệu, An ninh thông tin, Rủi ro và Tuân thủ để triển khai hiệu quả các chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn và công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu trong phạm vi được phân công, góp phần đảm bảo hoạt động quản trị dữ liệu toàn hàng được vận hành liên tục, an toàn và hiệu quả.
2. Nhiệm vụ/trách nhiệm chính:
i. Thiết kế và triển khai Data Security Framework thống nhất trên toàn tổ chức.
ii. Quản lý các hoạt động bảo mật dữ liệu theo vòng đời dữ liệu (data lifecycle):
• Phân loại và gắn nhãn dữ liệu (Data Classification & Tagging)
• Mã hóa và quản lý khóa (Encryption & Key Management)
• Ẩn danh, che dấu dữ liệu (Masking, Tokenization)
• Quản lý truy cập và phân quyền (Access Control, IAM, ABAC/RBAC)
• Giám sát và phát hiện rò rỉ dữ liệu (DLP, Monitoring, Incident Response)
iii. Xây dựng và cập nhật chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn bảo mật dữ liệu, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị IT Security, Data Governance, QTRR và Tuân thủ.
iv. Tham gia triển khai, đánh giá và kiểm soát tuân thủ các quy định pháp luật về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân và bảo mật thông tin.
v. Đào tạo, nâng cao nhận thức về bảo mật dữ liệu cho các đơn vị kinh doanh và kỹ thuật.
vi. Xây dựng báo cáo định kỳ về tình hình an ninh dữ liệu, cảnh báo sớm rủi ro và kế hoạch cải thiện cho Ban Lãnh đạo.
requirement:
i. Trình độ & kinh nghiệm
• Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, An toàn thông tin, Khoa học dữ liệu, hoặc tương đương.
• Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong các lĩnh vực: Information Security, Data Governance, IT Risk, hoặc Cloud Security.
• Hiểu biết về các tiêu chuẩn và khung kiểm soát bảo mật dữ liệu: ISO 27001/27701, NIST, GDPR, PCI-DSS, Decree 13/2023/NĐ-CP.
• Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hoặc quản lý các công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu: DLP, Data Masking, Encryption, IAM, SIEM, Key Vault, Cloud Security Tools.
ii. Kỹ năng
• Khả năng thiết kế và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu ở cấp tổ chức.
• Tư duy data-centric security, cân bằng giữa bảo mật và hiệu quả kinh doanh.
• Kỹ năng điều phối liên phòng ban, giao tiếp tốt, và ra quyết định nhanh trong tình huống sự cố.
• Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ quốc tế: CISSP, CISM, CDPSE, ISO 27001 LA/LI, CDMP Practitioner, CISA.
• SQL, các công cụ BI

The role focuses on CI/CD automation, cloud operations, SAP BTP platform support, monitoring, deployment management, and production reliability across customer environments.

Maintain and support cloud infrastructure across AWS and SAP BTP environments
Support application deployment and operational activities
Configure and maintain networking, VPN, firewall, SSL certificates, and secure connectivity
Support production systems with reliability and operational best practices
Manage SAP BTP subaccounts, entitlements, destinations, Cloud Connector, and connectivity configurations
Support SAP BTP application deployments and customer onboarding activities
Configure and support authentication and SSO integrations with IAS, Entra ID (Azure AD), Okta, and SAML/OIDC providers
Assist with enterprise identity and authorization integrations
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitLab
Automate deployments, rollback, validation, and operational tasks
Automate infrastructure provisioning and configuration using Terraform and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) practices
Maintain deployment scripts, YAML configurations, and automation tooling
Improve release reliability and deployment standardization
Monitor application health, logs, jobs, and infrastructure status
Troubleshoot production issues and support root cause analysis
Maintain deployment runbooks, operational documentation, and support procedures
Support customer production go-live activities and deployment windows
Apply secure engineering and DevSecOps practices

job_description:
A. Test Planning
Hiểu rõ yêu cầu dữ liệu, quy trình nghiệp vụ và data workflow để xây dựng phạm vi kiểm thử toàn diện.
Xây dựng Test Plan, Test Case, Test Scenario, Test Data cho việc kiểm thử ETL, Data Pipeline, Data Lake, Data Warehouse và Data Mart.
Chủ động quản lý timeline, nhiệm vụ kiểm thử và báo cáo rủi ro phát sinh.
B. Test Execution – Data/ETL/DWH Testing
Thực hiện kiểm thử dữ liệu qua các tầng dữ liệu trong hệ thống (Landing, Ontology, Cleansed/Mart, Serving layer…)
Kiểm tra tính chính xác, toàn vẹn, đầy đủ, nhất quán của dữ liệu.
Kiểm thử ETL/ELT: mapping rules, transformation logic, aggregation, business rules.
Kiểm thử migration/replication giữa các nguồn dữ liệu hoặc nền tảng dữ liệu khác nhau.
Kiểm thử báo cáo, dashboard, metrics để đảm bảo dữ liệu phản ánh đúng nghiệp vụ.
Kiểm thử thủ công và tự động trên Database (SQL/NoSQL).
Thực hiện Regression Testing khi cập nhật pipeline hoặc thay đổi mô hình dữ liệu.
C. SQL Validation & Data Investigation
Viết và thực thi các truy vấn SQL phức tạp để đối soát dữ liệu giữa các tầng.
Làm việc với dữ liệu lớn để kiểm tra tính đồng nhất, completeness, accuracy.
Phân tích và điều tra nguyên nhân sai lệch dữ liệu (data discrepancy, data anomaly).
D. Defect Management
Ghi nhận, quản lý và theo dõi defect bằng các công cụ như Jira, Xray, Test Rail, Trello…
Phối hợp Data Engineer, BA, Developer để xử lý các lỗi liên quan đến dữ liệu hoặc ETL.
Chuẩn bị và trình bày báo cáo tiến độ kiểm thử cho Dev/Squad Lead.
E. Test Automation (Ưu tiên Senior)
Phát triển test scripts tự động bằng Python/SQL hoặc framework testing chuyên cho Data.
Đề xuất giải pháp tự động hóa kiểm thử để giảm effort thủ công và tăng độ bao phủ.
F. Phối hợp & Cải tiến
Phối hợp chặt chẽ với Data Engineer, BA, Data Modeler để làm rõ yêu cầu và rà soát logic xử lý dữ liệu.
Đề xuất cải tiến quy trình kiểm thử, tiêu chuẩn dữ liệu và cách thức vận hành Data Pipeline.
Tham gia xây dựng các tiêu chuẩn Data Quality, business rules, DQ metrics.

Collaborate & Communicate: Maintain clear communication in English regarding project status, technical hurdles, and architectural decisions, which is critical for our team's success.

MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC:
1. Quản lý và điều phối dự án
• Lập kế hoạch triển khai dự án, theo dõi timeline và kiểm soát tiến độ thực hiện.
• Điều phối công việc giữa các nhóm kỹ thuật, nghiệp vụ và vendor liên quan.
• Theo dõi, cập nhật và xử lý các vấn đề phát sinh trong quá trình triển khai.

• Tổ chức/ Điều phối công tác thu thập và làm rõ yêu cầu hệ thống.
• Tổ chức/ điều phối đội kỹ thuật và vendor xây dựng giải pháp đáp ứng nhu cầu vận hành thực tế.
• Hỗ trợ phân tích ảnh hưởng và đề xuất phương án triển khai phù hợp.
3. Quản lý triển khai và kiểm thử
• Theo dõi quá trình triển khai hệ thống và các hoạt động kiểm thử.
• Phối hợp tổ chức các hoạt động SIT, UAT và nghiệm thu hệ thống.
• Theo dõi và hỗ trợ xử lý lỗi phát sinh trong quá trình kiểm thử và Go-live.
4. Quản lý đối tác và nhà cung cấp
• Làm việc với vendor và các bên liên quan để đảm bảo tiến độ và chất lượng triển khai.
• Theo dõi việc thực hiện các hạng mục theo kế hoạch dự án.
5. Hỗ trợ triển khai và vận hành sau Go-live
• Hỗ trợ triển khai hệ thống chính thức và phối hợp xử lý các vấn đề sau Go-live.
• Hỗ trợ đào tạo người dùng và bàn giao cho đội vận hành khi cần thiết.
6. Báo cáo và tài liệu dự án
• Cập nhật tài liệu và báo cáo tiến độ dự án định kỳ.
• Tổng hợp rủi ro, vấn đề phát sinh và đề xuất hướng xử lý cho cấp quản lý.
requirement:

Agile/Scrum ít nhất 3 năm
• Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực ngân hàng, tài chính hoặc các hệ thống doanh nghiệp.
• Hiểu biết cơ bản về quy trình phát triển phần mềm (SDLC).
• Có kỹ năng quản lý tiến độ, phối hợp công việc và làm việc với nhiều bên liên quan.

product-impact role.

You sit at the center of product discovery and delivery – ensuring the right problems are solved, with the right priority, and that outcomes scale to hundreds of thousands of users. ~25% of time in an IT consultant rol
e, engaging directly with internal customers
Understand
real customer pain points, expectations, and constraints
Feed customer insights back into
product prioritization and solution design

customers, key stakeholder, business, engineering, design, and operations

UAT
Measure delivery outcomes against
business success criteria
Technical, AI & Adoption Excellence
Define
functional and nonfunctional requirements

Collaborate closely with engineering through
design, build, and delivery
Support
AI-driven workflows, intelligent automation, change management, and adoption

company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited

job_description:
We’re redefining how Bosch works.
Our global product team is evolving to be a best-in-class workflow platform that serves as the backbone for 500,000+ users worldwide. Built on advanced low-code/no-code (NCLC) and accelerating with GenAI, this platform is entering its next chapter becoming truly AI-native, smarter, faster, and more intuitive at scale.
We’re looking for a
Senior IT Product & Service Manager (PSM)
who combines strong product ownership with execution mindset. The role requires understanding of complex architectures, experience in technology leadership, and responsible for strategic decisions.
You’ll work closely with engineers, designers, and business leaders to turn vision into product functions and features using Agile principles to move fast, stay focused, and deliver meaningful outcomes.
If you’re driven by impact, energized by complexity and standardization for efficiency, and ready to lead at global scale join us.
Key Responsibilities:
Product Vision & Strategy:
Define and own the product vision, positioning, and roadmap, aligned with long term digital strategy.
Drive prioritization and investment decisions that balance value, risk, cost, and scalability.
Stay up to date with market trends, competitive landscape, and emerging technologies to identify opportunities and risks.
Continuous improvement mindset, encouraging the team to explore new ideas and approache
Continuous Workflows Platform Migration:
Lead the migration of legacy technology to Next Gen platform, leveraging new AI frameworks & solutions.
Ensure seamless transitions with change management best practices.
Manage keystakeholder expectation, and customer satisfaction.
Service Provisioning:
Ensure service reliability, performance, and SLA alignment.
Implement data driven monitoring and analytics to steer decisions and outcomes.
Drive operational excellence through simplification and efficiency.
Technical Expertise & Requirements Management:
Translate business and user needs into clear, feasible technical requirements aligned with desired outcomes, driven by data.
Provide technical expertise and guidance on software architecture, cloud infrastructure, and no-code/low-code platforms.
Understanding the workflow product is preferable, stay ahead of the latest industry trends and technologies to ensure the platform remains cutting-edge.
Product Lifecycle Management:
Own the entire product lifecycle: ideation → build → scale → optimize → sunset.
Drive continuous improvement and innovation by gathering and analyzing user feedback, conducting user research, and A/B testing.
Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure product success and inform data-driven decision-making.
Stakeholder & Vendor Management:
Act as a trusted product manager for global business and technology stakeholders.
Secure alignment and buy in for roadmap, priorities, and change.
Manage strategic vendors and technology partners with a focus on quality and long-term value.
Additional Responsibilities:
Product Architecture:
Ensure product is designed for high availability, performance, and maintainability.
Security and Compliance:
Collaborate with security teams to ensure product adheres to security best practices and compliance requirements.
Stay informed about evolving security threats and proactively address vulnerabilities.
Agile Leadership:
Empower teams to self-organize, make data-driven decisions, and deliver value iteratively.

omputer science, Engineering, or a related field.

in technical product management, with a focus on complex systems and large-scale IT solutions.
Deep expertise in software architecture, cloud infrastructure, and no-code/low-code platforms.
Proven ability to lead and inspire cross-functional teams.
Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to convey technical concepts to varied audiences.
Proficiency in data analysis and decision-making tools.

🚀 3 Lý do bạn không thể bỏ lỡ Rakus Vietnam
1. Không rào cản ngôn ngữ (No English/Japanese Required)
Tại Rakus, "Code" là ngôn ngữ duy nhất. Chúng tôi không yêu cầu kỹ năng tiếng Anh hay tiếng Nhật. Bạn chỉ cần tập trung vào chuyên môn kỹ thuật. Mọi rào cản ngôn ngữ đã có đội ngũ Comtor hỗ trợ.
2. 3 kỳ nghỉ dài (9 ngày liên tục/kỳ) mỗi năm
Chúng tôi trân trọng thời gian bạn dành cho gia đình. Ngoài kỳ nghỉ Tết Âm lịch, công ty chủ động thiết lập các kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt vào dịp Golden Week (tháng 4-5) và Năm mới Dương lịch (tháng 12-1). Mỗi dịp này bạn sẽ được nghỉ liên tục 9 ngày.
Bạn có thể thoải mái du lịch hay về quê mà không cần dùng đến phép năm!
Tổng số ngày nghỉ lễ trong năm lên đến hơn 30 ngày.
3. Nền tảng vững chắc (PHP/Java) x Công nghệ AI (Github Copilot, v.v.)
Chúng tôi phát triển sản phẩm SaaS ổn định được hơn 10.000 doanh nghiệp Nhật Bản tin dùng, nhưng quy trình làm việc luôn được cập nhật mới nhất.
Cấp tài khoản GitHub Copilot bản quyền cho toàn bộ kỹ sư.
Cấp tài khoản Devin, Claude Code cho những ai có nhu cầu.
Bạn sẽ phát triển thành một "Hybrid Engineer" – vừa có nền tảng Backend vững chắc, vừa thành thạo các công cụ AI hiện đại.

** Rakus Việt Nam là công ty 100% vốn đầu tư từ RAKUS Co., Ltd. - công ty nổi tiếng hàng đầu tại Nhật Bản cung cấp các dịch vụ đám mây (SaaS),
giúp các doanh nghiệp điều hành hoạt động của mình một cách nhanh chóng, tiện dụng nhất.

**Chúng tôi đang tuyển dụng 2
Java Senior/Principal Software Engineer:
LÀM VIỆC OFFLINE FULLTIME TẠI VĂN PHÒNG HEADOFFICE QUẬN 12:
Hệ thống phần mềm
quản lý chi phí và chi phí đi lại trong nội bộ Doanh nghiệp
; đang được sử dụng bởi hơn 20,000 Doanh nghiệp khách hàng tại Nhật Bản với hơn 1.7 triệu end-users.

Nếu:
・Bạn đang là Java Developer và muốn thăng tiến đến vị trí cao hơn
・Bạn mong muốn phát triển Career path theo hướng Techlead/Solution Architect trong tương lai
・Bạn mong muốn môi trường làm việc lâu dài (ít nhất 3 năm trở lên)
・Bạn có năng lực tập trung và thích tìm hiểu sâu về 1 hệ thống.

Hãy gia nhập đội ngũ phát triển series sản phẩm "Rakuraku" – SaaS chiếm thị phần số 1 tại Nhật Bản.
Phát triển: Thiết kế, triển khai và kiểm thử các tính năng mới sử dụng Java (Spring, Springboot).
Quy trình AI: Tận dụng các công cụ AI mới nhất để tăng tốc độ coding, refactoring và tự động hóa kiểm thử (test automation).
Tư duy sản phẩm: Tập trung vào chất lượng code (Quality) và khả năng bảo trì dài hạn (Maintainability).
requirement:

Có ít nhất 5 năm kinh nghiệm trở lên về kiến thức và đam mê lập trình ứng dụng web với:

Ưu tiên:

job_title: Senior Java Software Engineer (AWS, Acting Lead)
location: Waseco Building - 10 Pho Quang Street, Ward 02, Tan Son Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Java, English, Leadership, Spring Boot, PostgreSql, AWS
job_description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated
Java Technical Leader
to lead and grow a team of Software Engineers delivering scalable, secure, and high-quality backend systems.
In this role, you will combine strong Java architecture expertise, technical leadership, and modern engineering practices, including effective use of AI-assisted tools to improve productivity, quality, and decision-making.
You will work closely with international stakeholders, take end-to-end ownership of technical outcomes, and foster a culture of engineering excellence, continuous learning, and smart adoption of new technologies.

Key Responsibilities:
Technical & Team Leadership
Lead, mentor, and coach a team of Software Engineers, supporting their technical growth and career development.
Act as a hands-on technical leader, setting coding standards, architectural principles, and best practices.
Foster a collaborative, inclusive, and learning-oriented team culture with strong ownership and accountability.
Guide engineers on effective and responsible use of AI tools to enhance daily engineering work (e.g., design, coding, debugging, testing, documentation).
Proactively identify, troubleshoot, and resolve complex performance or scalability issues.
Work closely with DevOps/SRE teams to improve CI/CD pipelines, deployment reliability, and runtime stability.
Drive improvements in system observability, monitoring, and alerting.
Ensure high standards of code quality through design reviews, code reviews, automated testing, and documentation.
Design, develop, and review robust Java-based systems using Spring ecosystem and microservices architecture.
Global Collaboration
Work effectively with cross-functional and international teams (e.g., UK, US).
Communicate complex technical topics clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
AI-Augmented Engineering (Big Plus)
Leverage AI-assisted developer tools (e.g., for code generation, refactoring, test creation, log analysis, incident triage, and documentation) to:
Improve development speed without compromising quality
Reduce repetitive manual work
Support faster debugging and root-cause analysis
Promote best practices for AI usage, including validation of outputs, security awareness, and IP safety.
Explore and propose practical AI use cases in backend engineering, and system observability.
requirement:
Core Java & Backend Expertise
Strong expertise in Java, including OOP, multithreading, concurrency, collections, and performance tuning.
Hands-on experience with Spring / Spring Boot, Spring Data, Dependency Injection (DI), and transaction management.
Solid experience designing and building RESTful APIs and distributed microservices architectures.
Experience with SQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL) and NoSQL solutions (e.g., MongoDB, DynamoDB).
Strong understanding of data modeling, query optimization, and backend performance tuning.
Hands-on experience with AWS (e.g., EKS, S3, RDS, Lambda).
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and modern DevOps practices.
Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as DataDog for metrics, logs, and traces.
Ways of Working
Proficient with GitLab for version control and collaboration.
Experience working in Agile / Scrum environments.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to make sound technical decisions under constraints.
Strong spoken and written English for international collaboration.
Bonus / Differentiators
Proven experience using AI tools in daily engineering work (coding, debugging, testing, design, or operations).
Ability to mentor others on productive and responsible AI usage.
Familiarity with Kubernetes (K8s): containerization, deployment, scaling, and service-to-service communication.

location: Waseco Building - 10 Pho Quang Street, Ward 02, Tan Son Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: QA QC, English, Leadership, Automation Test
job_description:
We are seeking an experienced
Test Lead
to own and drive the testing strategy and quality practices for the
Byte by Yum! Commerce Platform
. In this role, you will lead the testing discipline across globally distributed engineering teams and ensure our e-commerce platform consistently delivers reliable, scalable, and high-quality digital experiences to millions of customers worldwide.

As the Test Lead, you will define and implement the overall quality and testing strategy, guide the automation approach, and establish engineering best practices across web and mobile platforms. You will partner closely with engineering, product, and DevOps teams to embed quality throughout the software development lifecycle and enable fast, confident releases in a high-transaction environment.
This role requires deep technical expertise in modern testing frameworks, strong leadership in automation strategy, and experience operating within complex, large-scale e-commerce platforms.

RESPONSIBILITIES:

Define and drive the overall testing strategy and quality standards for the platform.
Lead the automation strategy, ensuring scalable and maintainable test frameworks across web and mobile applications.
Establish best practices for functional, integration, end-to-end, and performance testing.
Establish quality standards, testing guidelines, and best practices across engineering teams.
Collaborate with engineering, product, and DevOps teams to embed quality into the CI/CD pipeline and development lifecycle.
Provide technical leadership and mentorship to QA and engineering teams across globally distributed environments.
Oversee test planning, execution, and reporting to ensure high levels of release confidence and platform reliability.
Continuously evaluate and improve testing tools, frameworks, and processes to support platform growth and scalability.
Lead defect management processes, ensuring issues are properly prioritized, tracked, and resolved.
requirement:
Bachelor's degree in computer science, or related technical field.
8+ years of experience in software quality assurance, with at least
3 years in a senior test role
supporting large-scale e-commerce or high-volume consumer platforms.
Proven experience leading testing strategies and quality initiatives in complex software platforms.
Strong background in test automation frameworks and modern testing methodologies.
Experience working with large-scale, high-transaction e-commerce systems.
Ability to collaborate effectively across engineering, product, and DevOps teams.
Strong leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills in fast-paced, agile environments.
Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for delivering high-quality software.
Ability to collaborate effectively across distributed global teams.
Strong spoken and written English for international collaboration.
Nice to Have:
Familiarity with Lambda Test for cross-browser and cross-device testing at scale.
ISTQB or other relevant QA certification.
Knowledge of performance or load testing tools.

job_title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (AI, C/C++, Python)
location: 21 Lê Quý Đôn, Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Machine Learning, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Python, C++, AI
job_description:
About the Company
OTANICS provides comprehensive IoT-based solutions for aquaculture that combine sensors and data science with state-of-the-art computer vision and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies. Our solutions provide supporting tools for shrimp farmers with insightful recommendations to make better, well-informed decisions, lower costs, and significantly increase yields as we strive toward a more sustainable aquaculture. Backed by top multinational corporations, we offer a large customer base and a work environment that prioritizes professional growth and performance.
The Job Overview
We are seeking a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to provide technical leadership within our growing team. You will collaborate with a diverse group of software engineers, data scientists, and ML experts to architect and deploy advanced models that solve real-world aquaculture challenges. As a senior member of the team, you are expected to stay at the forefront of AI developments, mentoring junior engineers while driving the technical direction of our perception and prediction pipelines.
Responsibilities
As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer, you will:
Drive the research and development of advanced AI models for specialized shrimp farming and processing applications.
Partner with leadership and cross-functional teams to identify and prioritize high-impact AI applications that stimulate business growth.
Oversee the design and execution of complex data collection and labeling strategies.
Architect and convert AI/ML models into robust, scalable APIs for seamless integration by other development teams.
Perform sophisticated statistical analysis on massive, multi-modal datasets to extract actionable insights.
Manage the end-to-end project infrastructure and the full lifecycle of AI model development.
Mentor and work alongside machine learning and data engineers to build production-grade models.
requirement:
Bachelor’s or higher degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or a related field.
Proficiency in C/C++/Python and strong foundation in data structures and algorithms.
In-depth, hands-on knowledge of deep learning fundamentals.
Hands-on experience with deep learning frameworks (e.g. PyTorch, TensorFlow).
Deep familiarity with modern deep learning architectures (e.g., Transformers, CNNs).
Experience deploying ML models into production pipelines with monitoring, validation, and iteration loops.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders.

job_description:
Gene Solutions is a leading company in Vietnam specializing in the research, development and application of the most advanced genetic tests, providing genetic testing services for screening, diagnosis and treatment orientation.
Over the years, Gene Solutions has continuously developed and invested in building a strong and excellent R&D team, focusing on research and application of useful technologies that have been certified in the world to bring latest genetic testing and services, with the best quality at the most affordable cost, increasing Vietnamese people's access to essential genetic tests for prevention, examination and treatment, improving the quality of medical examination and treatment, contributing to the quality of medical services and health for the community.
ROLE SUMMARY
Location: Ho Chi Minh City
Reports to: IT Director
The IT Infrastructure Senior Manager will lead and oversee the company’s entire IT infrastructure, including systems administration, network architecture, virtualization, and cloud platforms across all operating countries. This role ensures high availability, security, and scalability of IT systems to support business operations and strategic growth. The position will manage a team of system administrators and network engineers, lead infrastructure implementations in Vietnam and other countries, and collaborate with cross-functional teams and external partners in Vietnam and overseas.
RESPONSIBILITIES
Develop technical strategies, plans and cost-effective solutions to execute and enhance IT infrastructure in alignment with business objectives.
Lead data center management, IT operations, infrastructure architecture design and implementation, and disaster recovery planning to ensure that infrastructure capacity aligns with business needs and future growth.
Ensure IT systems and networks operate smoothly and continuously with nearly zero downtime.
Ensure system security hardening and compliance with company security policies.
Establish and enforce IT policies, standards, and best practices.
Be willing to get involved in project and technical matters, take a hands-on approach to project management, and roll up your sleeves to get your hands dirty when necessary.
Lead infrastructure projects from planning to execution in Vietnam and other countries.
Manage and mentor a small team, ensuring high performance and continuous development.
Collaborate with internal stakeholders and external partners to deliver projects on time and within budget.
requirement:
Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
Minimum 13 years in IT infrastructure technology, including at least 3 years in similar roles.
Proven experience in designing and managing modern enterprise networks with security best practices.
Extensive experience and strong knowledge in Unix/Linux, Windows Server, virtualization, network devices, security appliances, SDWAN, high-performance storage, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), network monitoring solutions, data center, and automation tools, CI/CD, zero trust, ZTNA, optimized infrastructure for AI and machine learning workloads…
Excellent leadership, communication, and project management skills.
Integrity, accountability, ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities.
Fluent in English (written and spoken).
A demonstrated commitment to continuous learning such as IT professional certifications or higher education diplomas, is an advantage.
Knowledge and experience in high performance computer and storage is a plus.
Experience in DevOps or SysOps is a plus.

job_description:
We are on a journey to modernize our digital banking platform. We aren't just maintaining code; we are re-engineering it for speed, scale, and security. We are looking for experienced mobile engineers enjoys solving complex technical challenges and wants to have a direct influence on the architecture of a real-world banking application.

Modernize & Optimize: Lead the transition to cleaner, modularized code. Improve app performance, responsiveness, and memory management.
Build the Future: Design and implement new, user-centric features that make banking easier for millions of customers.
Engineering Excellence: Champion best practices through code reviews, automated testing, and proactive refactoring of legacy components
Collaborate: Partner closely with Backend, Product, and UX/UI teams to turn business needs into high-performance technical solutions.
Solve Problems: Tackle production challenges head-on, ensuring our platform is stable, secure, and reliable.
requirement:
Different projects and squads may focus on different technical domains. Candidates with strengths in relevant areas will be considered for suitable engineering teams across our banking technology ecosystem.

1. Engineering Rigor & Quality
•    Testing Culture: Hands-on experience writing Unit Tests, Automated UI Tests, and API Mocks/Stubs. You prioritize testable code over "quick fixes."
•    Code Health: Deep application of SOLID, YAGNI, and KISS principles. Strict adherence to coding conventions and documentation standards.
•    Performance: Proven ability to identify and resolve bottlenecks using platform profiling tools (e.g., Instruments, Android Profiler). Experience with threading and complex offline data synchronization.
2. Banking-Grade Security & Integration
•    Security (Critical): Strong knowledge of secure mobile practices: Certificate Pinning, secure storage mechanisms (Keychain/Keystore), biometric authentication (FaceID/TouchID/ Fingerprint), and obfuscation techniques.
•    API Orchestration: Deep understanding of RESTful API lifecycle, request/response cycle management, and handling token-based authentication flows in a secure environment.
•    Ecosystem: Experience integrating and maintaining 3rd-party SDKs (e.g., Firebase, Analytics, Marketing tools like AppsFlyer, and UI frameworks like SnapKit/libraries across Android and iOS ecosystems).
3. Workflow & Tools:
•    DevOps/Collaboration: Daily usage of Git/GitLab and Jira/Redmine. You are comfortable with branching strategies (GitFlow/Trunk-based), code review workflows, and CI/CD practices.
•    Design-to-Code: High proficiency in interpreting complex Figma designs, ensuring pixel-perfect responsiveness across all device screen sizes and OS versions.
4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills
•    Technical Leadership: Ability to mentor junior developers, perform deep code reviews, and drive architectural decisions.
•    Future-Proofing: Experience or strong interest in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for cross-platform logic sharing.
•    Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to evaluate, prototype, and implement new mobile methodologies to improve the development lifecycle.
•    AI-SDLC: Experience in leverage AI tools in product development activities.
5. Core Competencies
5.1 Android Developer
•    Experience: 5+ years of professional experience in native Android development with Kotlin.
•    Technical Foundation: Deep understanding of the Android Lifecycle, OOP, and multithreading.
•    Architectural Mindset: Strong experience with MVVM, Clean Architecture, and Modularization. You should know how to build apps that are easy to test and maintain.
•    Modern Tools: Proficiency with Coroutines and Flow.
•    Quality Focused: You understand SOLID principles and aren’t afraid to refactor to improve code health.
•    Communication: Ability to work well in a team and explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
Bonus points for:
•    Hands-on experience with Jetpack Compose.
•    Experience in the Fintech/Banking domain or exposure to platforms like Backbase.
•    Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
•    Experience integrating advanced features like OCR/eKYC or AI-driven chatbots.
5.2 IOS Developer
•    Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent technical field.
•    Experience: 5+ years of professional iOS development experience using Swift.
•    Architecture: Mastery of MVVM and Coordinator patterns. Proficient in Clean Architecture and large-scale Modularization (dynamic frameworks/libraries).
•    Modern Swift: Deep expertise in Combine, Swift Concurrency (Async/Await), and Diffable DataSources.
•    Dependency Management: Advanced experience with Swift Package Manager (SPM) and dependency injection patterns.
Bonus points for:
•     Hands-on experience with SwiftUI.
•     Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
•    Experience integrating advanced features like OCR/eKYC or AI-driven chatbots.

required_skills: Product Design, Usability testing, User Journey Mapping, Product strategy, Figma
job_description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE
We are looking for a Senior Product Designer to take full ownership of the end-to-end design process for complex, multi-flow digital products. In this role, you will lead the entire design lifecycle, bringing a sophisticated lens to UX Research and Strategic Ideation to solve our most intricate product challenges.
You will be responsible for discovering business challenges, analyzing user insights, and proposing strategic solution directions. By collaborating directly with Business Owners, Analysts, and Engineers, you will shape product concepts from initial discovery through to high-fidelity execution, ensuring every design decision is backed by evidence and logical rigor.
Why Join Us?
Full-Flow Ownership: Lead the design journey from ambiguous problem spaces to polished, high-fidelity solutions.
Strategic Influence: Work as a key partner to Business Owners and decision-makers to shape the product roadmap.
High-Complexity Challenges: Tackle products with intricate business logic and multi-user workflows that require high-level structural thinking.
Evidence-Based Culture: Work in an environment that values deep research-driven design and rationalized solution framing.
JOB DESCRIPTION
UX Research & Discovery
End-to-End Research: Lead research across discovery, definition, and validation using qualitative and quantitative methods (interviews, field studies, surveys, usability tests, and data analysis).
Synthesis & Frameworks: Transform raw findings into actionable strategic tools: Personas, JTBD, User Journeys, Service Blueprints, and Opportunity Maps.
Business Alignment: Partner with stakeholders to align user insights with business goals, technical constraints, and operational logic.
Ideation & Solution Framing
Conceptual Direction: Drive the ideation of multiple solution directions, evaluating trade-offs based on user insights, business feasibility, and scalability.
Logic & Flow Architecture: Structure intricate interaction logic and system behaviors, ensuring all flows are consistent and well-rationalized.
Rapid Validation: Build and test prototypes to quickly validate hypotheses and refine product directions during the early stages of design.
Design Execution & Collaboration
High-Fidelity Delivery: Own the final UI/UX execution, ensuring high-quality wireframes and designs that are ready for technical hand-off.
Cross-Functional Synergy: Partner closely with Engineers and Analysts to align on scope, technical feasibility, and system workflows (API logic, operational rules, etc.).
Effective Communication: Present research outcomes and strategic directions directly to Business Owners and decision-making stakeholders.
requirement:
Must Have:
5+ years of experience as a Product Designer with a proven track record in full-flow design and a strong expertise in UX Research & Ideation.
Analytical Thinking: Exceptional ability to structure "messy" problem spaces using both qualitative and quantitative evidence.
Complex Problem Solving: Solid experience in developing and evaluating multiple solution directions for high-complexity or multi-user systems.
Technical Savvy: Proficiency in modern design tools (Figma, etc.) and a strong understanding of Design Systems to ensure feasibility.
Communication & Facilitation: Excellent skills in presenting to stakeholders and handling ambiguity in business requirements with a logical, evidence-based approach.
Ownership: A reliable professional capable of taking full ownership of the product design cycle with high autonomy.
Nice to Have:
Experience working in product design consulting or agency environments.
Familiarity with enterprise platforms, SaaS, or systems with heavy business logic.
A portfolio that highlights the transition from deep research insights to final, polished design solutions.

job_description:
Who Are We
Hansen Technologies is a leading global provider of software and services that enable organisations to transform customer experiences and streamline critical business processes. With a rich history of innovation and a footprint that spans over 80 countries, Hansen empowers utilities, energy, and communications companies to thrive in an ever-evolving digital landscape. Our commitment to excellence, customer focus, and collaborative culture makes Hansen a place where passionate professionals can make a meaningful impact, drive real change, and help shape the future of industries worldwide.

We are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. Hansen prides itself on celebrating diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, even extending this to how we work with our customers, partners, and suppliers. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, race, ethnicity, religion or belief, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. If you require any adjustments or accommodation during the recruitment process, please let us know.

Why This Role Matters

Lead, Inspire, Transform, Deliver.

At Hansen, our software powers critical services for industries that keep the world running. As a
Senior Software Development Manager
, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the future of our
CIS-HU engineering capability
, leading distributed teams across Vietnam and Australia.

This is more than a leadership role—it's an opportunity to
build high-performing engineering teams, elevate technical capability, and drive delivery excellence at scale
. You will influence how we adopt AI-assisted development, modern cloud platforms, and best-in-class engineering practices to innovate faster and deliver greater value to customers.

Your leadership will directly impact how our teams perform, how our products evolve, and how we deliver secure, scalable, and reliable solutions across global markets.

What You’ll Do
Lead Engineering Teams:
Develop and mentor Technical Leads and engineering teams across a distributed structure, driving high performance and engagement.
Drive Delivery Excellence:
Oversee planning, execution, and delivery across multiple teams, ensuring alignment with business priorities and customer commitments.
Advance AI & Productivity:
Embed AI-assisted engineering practices to enhance development efficiency, quality, and innovation.
Strengthen Technical Capability:
Champion modern cloud (AWS) and engineering practices including microservices, APIs, CI/CD, and automation.
Collaborate Across Functions:
Work closely with Product, Architecture, QA, DevOps, and Delivery to ensure cohesive execution and outcomes.
Enhance Quality & Standards:
Establish and maintain strong engineering standards, focusing on scalability, security, and performance.
Manage Risk & Improve Continuously:
Proactively identify delivery risks, resolve issues, and drive continuous improvement across teams.
requirement:
What You Bring
Proven experience leading software engineering teams across multiple layers of leadership, including Technical Leads.
Strong people leadership skills with the ability to coach, inspire, and develop high-performing teams.
Experience leading distributed teams across regions and cultures.
Deep understanding of modern engineering practices, cloud technologies (preferably AWS), and software architecture.
Exposure to AI-assisted development and engineering productivity improvements.
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence across technical and business audiences.
Expertise in CI/CD, microservices, APIs, containerisation, and secure development practices.
A passion for continuous improvement, innovation, and delivery excellence.

Background in cloud transformation or large-scale modernisation
Familiarity with tools such as Jira, Confluence, GitHub, and CI/CD platforms

job_description:
HRS, a pioneer in business travel, aims to elevate every stay through innovative technology. With over 50 years of experience, their digital platform, driven by ProcureTech, TravelTech, and FinTech, transforms how companies and travelers Stay, Work, and Pay.
ProcureTech digitally revolutionizes lodging procurement, connecting corporations and suppliers in a cutting-edge ecosystem. This enables seamless efficiency and automation, surpassing travelers' expectations.
TravelTech redefines the online lodging experience, offering personalized content from selection to check-in, ensuring an unparalleled journey for corporate travelers.
In FinTech, HRS introduces advancements like mobile banking and digital payments, turning corporate back offices into touchless lodging enablers, eliminating legacy cost barriers. The innovative 2-click book-to-pay feature streamlines interactions for travelers and hoteliers.
Combining these technology propositions, HRS unlocks exponential catalyst effects. Their data-driven focus delivers value-added services and high-return network effects, creating substantial customer value.
HRS's exponential growth since 1972 serves over 35% of the global Fortune 500 and leading hotel chains.
Join HRS to shape the future of business travel, empowered by a culture of growth and setting new industry standards worldwide.

The
Search & Book unit
at HRS plays a pivotal role in delivering innovative solutions through HRS Connect, the company's flagship product within the expansive global corporate travel management market. HRS Connect specifically targets the rapidly growing and significantly underserved segments of corporate lodging, meetings, groups, and long stays.
The unit develops, enhances, and maintains complex technology solutions that seamlessly integrate hotel distribution systems, Property Management Systems (PMS), Online Travel Agencies (OTA), and Hotel Chain systems into the HRS Connect platform.

A Senior Fullstack Engineer (AI-Native)
builds production-grade applications and intelligent workflows with an AI-first mindset across the full software development lifecycle. This role is for an engineer who does not treat AI as an add-on, but as a core way of working across design, implementation, testing, documentation, debugging, and delivery.
The ideal candidate consistently approaches work by asking whether a task can be completed entirely with AI or materially improved through AI-assisted execution, while still applying strong engineering judgment and quality controls.

Full-Stack Engineering: Design, build, and maintain scalable applications using Next.js/TypeScript (frontend) and Java/Python (backend).
AI-Native Product Development: Integrate GenAI APIs and LLM-powered capabilities into core product workflows. Build agentic flows, tool-using systems, and AI workflow automations with clear guardrails and observability.
AI-Native Engineering Practice: Apply AI-assisted workflows across the full SDLC - from design and implementation to testing, debugging, and documentation. Review and validate AI-generated outputs for correctness, security, and production readiness.
Technical Leadership: Drive architectural decisions, mentor engineers, and champion AI-native engineering practices across the team.
requirement:
7+ years of professional full-stack engineering experience across frontend, backend, APIs, databases, and production systems, with strong end-to-end ownership of product delivery.
Hands-on expertise with Next.js, React, and TypeScript, including server-side rendering, component-based architecture, and state management.
Strong backend development skills in Java and/or Python, with solid understanding of system architecture, scalability, and production reliability.
Experience integrating GenAI APIs, LLM features, assistants, or AI-powered product capabilities into production systems.
Immersive adoption of AI across the SDLC. Demonstrated experience using AI-assisted development workflows for scaffolding, refactoring, testing, debugging, documentation, and delivery while critically reviewing outputs and maintaining engineering standards.
AI-first mindset. Approaches every task by asking whether it can be completed entirely with AI or improved significantly through AI, then applies the right level of human review, validation, and control.
Excellent communication skills and fluency in English to collaborate effectively in an international environment.

job_description:
ABOUT THE ROLE
Crossian is a high-growth, technology-driven e-commerce business. Behind our success is our people. Since launching in 2020, we've built a dynamic, fast-paced environment enabling both our business and team members to achieve a cumulative average growth rate of over 1000% in just three years. Our mission now is to build powerful direct-to-consumer brands and maximize customer lifetime value.
We’re currently looking for a
UI Designer
(with UX mindset) who is passionate about visual design, but also understands how users think and what makes digital interfaces truly usable.
As a UI Designer, you’ll work on real product features across our eCommerce platform - from product management to payment, analytics, and beyond. You’ll design clean, scalable UI that supports real user goals. You’ll also collaborate closely with Developers, PMs, and Data Analysts, using live user data to inform and improve your designs.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

Simplify complex flows
Own UI design for some of the most complex workflows in our eCommerce platform - like product setup, inventory rules, fulfillment settings, and analytics dashboards
Simplify multi-step tasks, data-heavy views, and backend logic into clean, focused, and usable interfaces.
Balance technical edge cases, user mental models, and business logic and still make the experience feel effortless
UI & Design Systems
Create responsive, high-fidelity mockups and clickable prototypes in Figma
Apply layout grids, spacing logic, typography, and visual hierarchy
Build reusable components and contribute to our shared Design System
Design with data
Use real user data - behavior tracking, funnels, and test results - to make design decisions and measure outcomes.
Work closely with PMs, Developers, and Analysts across the product lifecycle: discovery, delivery, iteration.
Join agile rituals and present your work clearly in design reviews and product discussions.
requirement:
3+ years designing UI for digital products (web/mobile)
Portfolio with at least 3 shipped projects showing UI thinking and outcome
Expert in Figma: Components, Variants, Auto Layout, Prototypes
Experience with Design Systems, component libraries; strong understanding of responsive design, layout systems, and visual clarity
Solid UX foundation: user flows, usability principles, iterative design
Comfortable reading and discussing design in English
Preferred Qualifications (Not Required)
Experience in eCommerce or other data-heavy product platforms.
Familiarity with HTML/CSS or motion/interaction design
Experience using data tools (Hotjar, FullStory, A/B testing platforms)

job_description:
YOU
You want to be a key member of a strong team of creators who take pride in their work and support one another. As a
Senior
UX Engineer
, you will be responsible for
collaborating with the team to build a variety of Simpson Strong-Tie digital products, leveraging your valuable skills and competence, and contributing to the growth of the organization. You’ll focus on delivering intuitive, efficient, and innovative solutions that address business needs, helping drive progress forward
. Your impact will be recognized, and if career growth is important to you, we not only know how to support your development—we're passionate about it:

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING
Front-end Development
Develop, test, and maintain performant, scalable code using React/Next.js and TypeScript.
Build reusable, modular components and libraries that power Simpson Strong-Tie's digital products.
Ensure applications are responsive, fast, accessible, and well-tested across devices and browsers.

UX & Design Collaboration
Partner with designers early — contribute to design decisions and propose interaction patterns rather than only consuming Figma artifacts.
Build and maintain the design system and component library as the shared source of truth between design and engineering.
Advocate for accessibility (WCAG), usability, and consistent interaction patterns across products.

Architecture & Performance
Lead the design of complex front-end applications, ensuring scalability and performance.
Collaborate with backend engineers on integration via REST APIs and WebSockets.
Optimize performance using techniques like lazy loading, code splitting, and tools like Lighthouse and Chrome DevTools.

AI-Augmented Development
Leverage AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, or similar) to accelerate development while maintaining code quality.
Prototype AI-powered features and integrate AI APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Azure OpenAI) where they add product value.
Critically evaluate AI output — knowing when to trust, verify, or override.

Collaboration & Mentorship
Partner with product managers, designers, and backend engineers across multiple product teams.
Mentor Interns, Engineers, and Associate Senior Engineers — including how to work effectively with AI tools.
Lead code reviews, establish coding standards, and drive continuous improvement.

Curiosity about emerging AI capabilities and interest in integrating AI APIs into products
Fluent English communication skills (both verbal and written)
Excellent organizational and communication skills
Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodology

Familiarity with web security principles and front-end vulnerabilities (e.g., XSS, CSRF)

location: Tầng 11, Toà Nhà Robot, 308 - 308C, Điện Biên Phủ, Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Python, NodeJS, Kubernetes, AI, Database, TypeScript
job_description:
Why this role is different
Most engineering jobs ask you to maintain legacy systems or add features to crowded codebases. This isn't that.
You'll be one of the founding engineers shaping two products that sit at the intersection of AI, enterprise software, and infrastructure — at a moment when those three things are being rewritten from scratch. The code you write in your first six months will still be running in production five years from now. The architectural decisions you make will shape how thousands of Korean small businesses experience AI, and how GPU compute is delivered across Southeast Asia.
We don't believe in 200-person engineering orgs where you ship one feature per quarter. We believe in small teams of strong engineers who own entire systems end-to-end, ship fast, and use AI tools to operate like teams 5x their size.
The two products you'll build
CoSAP — AI-Powered Business Intelligence for Korean SMEs
Korean small and medium businesses run on Douzone and ECount — ERP systems that hold decades of accounting and operational data, but expose it through forms and reports built for accountants, not founders. CoSAP changes that. We let business owners ask questions in plain Korean — "왜 이번 달 마진이 떨어졌어?" (why did our margin drop this month?) — and get answers backed by their actual financial data.
Under the hood: a multi-tenant data layer connecting Douzone and ECount, retrieval over financial and operational data using PostgreSQL with pgvector and Qdrant, event streaming with Kafka, workflow orchestration with Kestra, and self-hosted LLM serving with vLLM. The Korean SME market is 7+ million businesses. Almost none of them have access to real business intelligence today.
Fusionflow — GPU & AI Infrastructure Orchestration
GPUs are the most expensive, most contested compute resource on earth right now. We operate Kubernetes-based GPU clusters across multiple data centers and turn them into reliable, multi-tenant compute that customers can actually use. Fusionflow is the orchestration layer: scheduling, isolation, observability, and operations.
You'll work on real distributed systems problems — GPU scheduling under contention, node health and failure recovery, network performance tuning across InfiniBand and RoCE, tenant isolation, and the operational tooling needed to run hundreds of GPUs reliably. We currently operate a 19-node K3s cluster with 160+ GPUs and are scaling significantly through 2026.
What you'll actually do
Concretely — not buzzwords, but the kind of tickets you'll close in your first year:
Build the next-generation ERP connector layer
for CoSAP — designing schemas, sync logic, and conflict resolution for ECount and Douzone data flowing into our analytics layer.
Improve retrieval quality
for natural-language financial queries — chunking strategies, embedding models, hybrid search, and evaluation pipelines.
Design and operate Fusionflow's GPU scheduling logic
— how do we fairly allocate scarce GPU resources across tenants while keeping latency low?
Harden cluster operations
— node health monitoring, automated remediation, network tuning, DDoS mitigation, observability.
Write production-grade APIs and internal tooling
in Python and TypeScript that other engineers, ops staff, and customers depend on.
Review AI-generated code with the same rigor as human code
— catching subtle bugs, hallucinated APIs, security issues, and performance regressions.
Be on-call
for systems you build. Debug real outages. Write the postmortem. Ship the fix.
requirement:
In the AI era, raw coding skill is no longer the bottleneck. Almost anyone can produce working code with Claude Code or Cursor. What separates strong engineers from average ones now is judgment, taste, and verification discipline. Here's what we actually screen for, in priority order:
1. Verification instinct — the ability to spot when AI output is wrong
This is the #1 filter. AI tools produce confident, plausible-looking code that is sometimes subtly broken — hallucinated APIs, wrong async behavior, race conditions, security holes, schema mismatches. The best engineers today treat AI output as a draft from a fast, overconfident junior, not as truth. We will test this in the interview.
2. Strong fundamentals in distributed systems
You understand consistency, idempotency, retries, queues, timeouts, and what happens when networks partition. You've worked with Kubernetes, Kafka (or equivalent), and PostgreSQL in production — not just in tutorials. You know why SELECT FOR UPDATE exists and when to use it.
3. Problem decomposition over prompt engineering
Given an ambiguous request, you ask the right clarifying questions before writing code. You can break "sync ECount data into our analytics layer" into a concrete technical plan covering schema, ingestion, idempotency, error handling, and observability — before opening Claude Code.
4. Production ownership and operational maturity
You've been on-call. You've debugged a real outage at 2 AM. You read logs, traces, and metrics fluently. You write code defensively because you've been burned. You don't say "works on my machine" — you say "let me check what differs in production."
5. Code reading > code writing
Most of your time is spent reading and reviewing, not greenfield writing. You can drop into an unfamiliar codebase, orient yourself in a few hours, and identify what to change. You're comfortable navigating large repos, reading other people's code, and understanding intent.
6. AI tool fluency with healthy skepticism
Daily use of Claude Code, Cursor, or Copilot. Familiarity with MCP, agent workflows, tool calling, and prompt design. Most importantly: you know where these tools fail and you compensate. A candidate who blindly trusts AI output is more dangerous than one who doesn't use it at all.
7. Clear written communication in English
PR descriptions, technical specs, runbooks, prompt design, async messaging with a globally distributed team. Clear writing equals clear thinking. We work asynchronously across Singapore, HCMC, and Korea — written communication is the medium.
The stack you'll work with
Languages:  Python, TypeScript / Node.js (some Go for infrastructure)
Data: PostgreSQL, pgvector, Qdrant, Kafka, Kestra
AI / ML:  vLLM, sentence-transformers, embedding models, RAG pipelines
Infrastructure: Kubernetes (K3s), Docker, Linux, GPU operators
Networking: InfiniBand, RoCE, DWDM (you'll learn what you don't know)
AI Tooling: Claude Code, Cursor, MCP servers, custom agent workflows
Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, structured logging
Source / CI" Git, GitHub Actions, code review culture
Nice-to-haves (not required)
Korean language reading ability — significant advantage for CoSAP work
Experience with ERP systems (Douzone, ECount, SAP, Oracle)
GPU/CUDA familiarity, or experience operating Kubernetes with GPU workloads
RAG and vector search tuning experience
Smart contract or blockchain experience (we have adjacent projects in tokenized infrastructure)
Open-source contributions, technical blog, or side projects we can look at

Strong English communication skills (verbal and written).

Manual Testing:
Experience in software testing for web-based applications.

Strong understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and software testing life cycle (STLC).
Full-stack Testing:

Automation Testing:

Nice to have:

location: 36 Hoàng Cầu, O Cho Dua, Ha Noi

job_description:
1. Chiến lược kiến trúc ứng dụng
Xây dựng và cập nhật khung kiến trúc ứng dụng thống nhất toàn ngân hàng.
Định hướng chuyển đổi từ ứng dụng truyền thống sang cloud-native, microservices hoặc serverless.
2. Thiết kế giải pháp ứng dụng
Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, kỹ thuật và dữ liệu để thiết kế kiến trúc ứng dụng tối ưu.
Xây dựng giải pháp phù hợp với cả môi trường on-prem và cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP...).
Đề xuất các mô hình thiết kế đảm bảo khả năng mở rộng, tính sẵn sàng cao và tối ưu vận hành.
3. Kiến trúc tích hợp và kết nối hệ thống
Thiết kế kiến trúc tích hợp giữa các hệ thống nghiệp vụ: Core Banking, CRM, kênh số, Data Platform.
Tư vấn giải pháp API Gateway, ESB, message queue (Kafka, RabbitMQ), event streaming.
Hỗ trợ chiến lược Open API và tích hợp với đối tác/Fintech theo mô hình Open Banking.
4. Chuyển đổi lên Cloud & hiện đại hóa ứng dụng
Đề xuất và thiết kế lộ trình chuyển đổi ứng dụng lên cloud theo mô hình Rehost/Refactor/Replatform.
Tối ưu hóa chi phí và hiệu suất vận hành trên cloud.
Thúc đẩy ứng dụng DevSecOps, container hóa (Docker, Kubernetes), GitOps.
5. Đảm bảo phi chức năng (NFRs)
Thiết kế để đáp ứng các yêu cầu: hiệu năng, bảo mật, ổn định, mở rộng, giám sát, logging...
Tư vấn các chiến lược caching, HA, DR, autoscaling.
6. Đào tạo và phát triển năng lực kỹ thuật
Hướng dẫn, đào tạo các nhóm kỹ thuật về kiến trúc hiện đại, công nghệ cloud và mô hình phát triển linh hoạt.
Đóng vai trò kiến trúc sư chủ chốt trong hội đồng kiến trúc ngân hàng.
requirement:
Bằng cấp: Tốt nghiệp Cao Đẳng, Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin/ Điện tử viễn thông/ Tin học
Kinh nghiệm: 6-10 năm kinh nghiệm, trong đó có 5 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí tương đương
Hiểu biết sâu về kiến trúc phần mềm: monolith, microservices, event-driven, domain-driven design.
Kiến thức vững về cloud computing, hybrid architecture, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
Thành thạo mô hình tích hợp hệ thống: API (REST/gRPC), messaging, streaming, event sourcing.
Kiến thức tốt về bảo mật hệ thống, xác thực phân quyền, mã hóa, logging, audit.
Có tư duy chiến lược và khả năng truyền đạt kỹ thuật tốt.
Tư vấn công nghệ, chủ động xác định rủi ro kiển trúc và đề xuất giải pháp.
Làm việc chặt chẽ với PM, BA, DEV, QE
Khả năng cập nhật công nghệ mới và đánh giá áp dụng công nghệ phù hợp vào thực tiễn.
Quyết liệt, thẳng thắn, trực diện với vấn đề nhằm đạt mục tiêu trong công việc.
Chú trọng đến chi tiết trong công việc.

location: Tòa nhà E.Town Central, Số 11 Đoàn Văn Bơ, Xom Chieu, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: Golang, English, AI, Kotlin, TypeScript, Java
job_description:
At Money Forward Inc., we are dedicated to transforming financial services through advanced technology. With over 50 services for individuals and businesses—including products such as Money Forward ME and Money Forward Cloud—we help users better understand and manage their finances. Our platform leverages industry-leading account aggregation technology to turn financial data into meaningful insights.
Within the Money Forward Business Segment (MFBS), Money Forward Cloud is a component-based cloud ERP composed of multiple service groups. While this modularity provides flexibility, developing services in isolation can lead to data silos, inconsistent user experiences, and reduced development efficiency.
The Business Platform Development (BPD) division addresses this by building the shared foundations that unify services across the platform. We develop and operate common microservices and backend systems that power workflows and platform functionality throughout Money Forward Cloud. Our mission is to standardize capabilities, reduce technical friction, improve scalability, and enable product teams to move faster with confidence.
We are looking for a senior, execution-oriented engineering leader who combines strong hands-on engineering skills with a high sense of ownership. In this role, you will drive complex backend initiatives end-to-end, contribute code where it has the most impact, and help teams turn ambiguity into clear, executable work. Rather than focusing on ceremonies, you will lead through technical direction, decision-making, and presence—supporting both delivery and the people doing the work while aligning priorities and unblocking execution.
This role offers the opportunity to create outsized impact across Tokyo and Vietnam teams by stabilizing execution, raising engineering standards, and strengthening the reliability of Money Forward’s common platform services.

Take end-to-end ownership of backend initiatives, from problem definition through delivery and follow-up.
Drive execution by turning ambiguous goals into clear, actionable work with defined ownership.
Design, implement, and review scalable backend systems and services, contributing hands-on where it has the highest impact.
Use AI to rapidly transform the requirements into a functional reality.
Ultra-fast prototyping and initial production deployment within a matter of days, leveraging generative AI.
Instantly identifying technical flaws in AI-generated code or UI, and then correcting and improving them.
Identify technical, delivery, and organizational blockers early and push initiatives past them.
Act as a technical and execution anchor for engineers across Tokyo and Vietnam.
Provide technical guidance, code reviews, and mentorship to raise engineering quality, ownership, and team confidence.
Support planning and delivery by helping teams scope work realistically, surface dependencies, and maintain momentum.
Serve as a key technical contact point between engineering teams, product, and leadership to ensure alignment and visibility.
Improve team processes pragmatically, focusing on outcomes rather than ceremonies.
Support engineers through mentorship, coaching, and timely feedback—helping individuals grow confidence, ownership, and execution capability.

requirement:

1. Quản trị Kiến trúc Công nghệ:
Tham gia xây dựng, cải tiến, giám sát việc thực thi các văn bản quy định, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn nhằm xây dựng cơ chế quản lý các thay đổi về kiến trúc trong toàn bộ hệ thống công nghệ (được ghi nhận, phân tích, triển khai phù hợp với quy hoạch chung về công nghệ và chiến lược kinh doanh).
Tổ chức thực hiện tài liệu hóa, duy trì cập nhật Kho thông tin kiến trúc của các hệ thống hiện tại. Phân tích, đánh giá, phê duyệt các thay đổi kiến trúc môt cách khoa học.
Tham gia xây dựng các Kiến trúc giải pháp cho các dự án công nghệ. Đánh giá sau khi triển khai dự án để giám sát việc triển khai dự án tuân thủ theo Kiến trúc giải pháp đã phê duyệt.
Phối hợp với các bên liên quan xây dựng và thường xuyên cập nhật Kiến trúc công nghệ tổng thể (EA) và lộ trình phát triển tại MSB đáp ứng chiến lược kinh doanh của MSB từng thời kỳ.
2. Tư vấn giải pháp công nghệ phục vụ nhu cầu phát triển chiến lược của MSB và tối ưu hóa vận hành:
Tổ chức và tiếp nhận, nắm bắt các yêu cầu và định hướng kinh doanh từ TGĐ và các NHCD, khối/ban hỗ trợ theo phân công của lãnh đạo.
Phối hợp với các đơn vị trong và ngoài MSB để tìm kiếm, cập nhật các công nghệ mới.
Tư vấn, tham mưu với GĐ Khối, các NHCD/Khối/Ban hỗ trợ về xu hướng công nghệ, lộ trình phát triển và ứng dụng công nghệ tại MSB theo phân công của lãnh đạo.
Phối hợp với các đơn vị xây dựng ngân sách đầu tư công nghệ hàng năm dựa trên lộ trình triển khai chiến lược và nhu cầu kinh doanh từ các đơn vị.
3. Tổ chức phối hợp triển khai dự án:
Phối hợp với các đơn vị tìm kiếm và lựa chọn các phương án đầu tư, nguồn lực và thời gian triển khai các dự án công nghệ.
Tham gia triển khai các dự án công nghệ cụ thể theo phân công của Giám đốc Trung tâm.

job_description:
BE A MAKER
At Simpson Strong-Tie, we've built a workplace where people are connected and engaged in creative thinking from day one throughout their careers.
When you think of the best a family has to offer - support, collaboration and respect - that's what we value at Simpson Strong-Tie. When there's a win, we'll cheer you on. When there's a snag, coworkers step in to help you out. Working on solutions together is just the way we do things here, and that creates an atmosphere that often feels like home.
At Simpson Strong-Tie, you'll find talented, passionate, dedicated, humble and genuinely kind people who are all connected by our shared mission - to provide solutions that help people design and build safer, stronger structures.
It's this mission and our strong people-focused values that have made Simpson Strong-Tie a unique place to work for more than 70 years - a place where you can connect, create and build your career. We invite you to  about our culture and why our employees are our most loyal customers.

YOU
You will
serve as a primary technical authority, providing both leadership and architectural expertise for Simpson’s application services and enterprise solutions. You will collaborate closely with the US Technical Leads, Development Manager and key stakeholders to propose and execute innovative technical strategies that align with organizational goals and maximize customer satisfaction.

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

The successful candidate will provide subject matter expertise in .NET to lead the development of high-performance engines and scalable web applications. The candidate will oversee the robustness of .NET backend integrations and ensure the stability of cross-platform services.

.

and/or

to establish real-time alerting and system health dashboards.
Serve as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) to resolve complex technical challenges and support the team in troubleshooting advanced issues.

job_description:
We are seeking a Technical Lead to drive the architecture and development of high-performance, low-latency backend systems built with Golang/Java. The role emphasizes secure networking, real-time event streaming, and hybrid cloud/on-premise architectures. You will be responsible for leading engineering teams to design and scale distributed services that operate under massive concurrency, while ensuring performance, resilience, and security across environments.
Key Responsibilities
Lead the design and implementation of distributed backend services in Golang.
Build systems with advanced networking, routing, and encryption capabilities using modern protocols.
Define and evolve system architecture for multi-region, highly available deployments across AWS and on-premise infrastructure.
Deliver performant APIs and control systems for secure, large-scale connectivity and real-time workloads.
Design for high Concurrent User (CCU) loads, focusing on throughput, latency reduction, and horizontal scalability.
Leverage Redis for caching, distributed coordination, and Pub/Sub messaging.
Use Kafka for scalable event streaming, log aggregation, and operational analytics.
Conduct performance tuning, load testing, and fault injection to validate system resilience.
Embed strong cryptographic and secure communication practices (key exchange, rotation, encryption in transit and at rest).
Collaborate with security stakeholders to align with compliance standards (SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR).
Implement CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible), and GitOps workflows.
Manage Kubernetes clusters (AWS EKS and on-prem) for containerized workloads, ensuring scalability and high availability.
Drive observability with metrics, logs, and traces (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry).
Provide hands-on technical leadership and mentor engineering team members.
Guide design reviews, enforce coding standards, and foster a culture of technical excellence.
Partner with Product and Operations teams to translate requirements into scalable solutions.
requirement:
Must Have
Expertise in Golang, including concurrency, networking, and performance profiling.
Strong understanding of WireGuard protocol and modern secure networking approaches.
Advanced experience with Redis (caching, Pub/Sub, clustering, distributed locks).
In-depth knowledge of Kafka (streaming pipelines, consumer group management, schema evolution).
Proven experience with Kubernetes (EKS, on-premise clusters) and AWS cloud services (VPC, EC2, IAM, MSK, ElastiCache).
Background in large-scale distributed systems handling thousands of concurrent connections.
Strong DevOps mindset with automation, observability, and reliability engineering practices.

9+ years in backend engineering
(Golang)
with 3+ years in a Tech Lead.

location: 12A, Vietinbank building, 36 Tran Quoc Toan, Da Nang, Hai Chau, Da Nang
required_skills: NodeJS, Microservices, Cloud, English, AI
job_description:
About Everfit
At Everfit, we're on a mission to build the future of personalized fitness. We connect coaches and clients seamlessly through a global wellness marketplace where anyone can find the perfect coach - regardless of budget, goals or location. With nearly 280,000 coaches in 200+ countries, our platform supports not only personal trainers, but Olympic athletes, military trainers, celebrity coaches, cancer rehab specialists, and everyday heroes transforming lives through fitness. We're not just helping people get stronger—we're helping coaches build thriving businesses that make a real impact.
From workouts and nutrition to habit coaching, payments, and client communication, Everfit brings it all together with a powerful layer of automation to help coaches scale their impact and grow their business. We're integrating next-gen AI sidekicks - smart assistants that help coaches program and unlock deep health insights in real time. Imagine if Jarvis from Iron Man doubled as your personal fitness strategist!

Position Overview:
We are looking for a Tech Lead to anchor the technical direction of Everfit's Core squad, the most used, most business-critical part of our platform.

This is primarily a technical leadership role. Roughly 80% of your time will be on technical direction, architecture decisions, system design, code reviews, and mentoring engineers across Core's sub-squads. Around 20% will be hands-on coding, focused on the most complex and highest-stakes parts of the system.

What makes this role unique is breadth. Core's teams span backend, frontend, mobile, and DevOps, and you'll need to provide meaningful technical oversight across all of them. You don't need to be an expert in every discipline, but you should be fluent enough to guide architecture decisions, challenge technical trade-offs, and earn the trust of engineers regardless of their stack. Your primary depth is backend — that's where the hardest system design problems live. But your awareness of how mobile, frontend, and DevOps connect to the backend is what makes you effective as the technical anchor for Core.

We operate with an AI-first engineering mindset. You'll champion AI tools across the squad, helping engineers move faster, write better code, and ship with more confidence. We're also building AI features into the Core product itself, so you'll help shape how AI integrates with the coaching workflows coaches rely on every day.

Your impact
Technical Direction & Architecture
Own the architectural patterns and technical standards for Core's backend systems — workout programming engines, scheduling logic, nutrition tracking, multi-tenant platform infrastructure, notification pipelines, and third-party integrations.
Drive solution design for complex features: new product areas, cross-squad integrations, platform-level changes, and performance-critical systems.
Make architectural decisions that balance delivery velocity with long-term maintainability — Core is a high-frequency product and tech debt accumulates fast.
Define and uphold engineering standards across all six Core sub-squads: API design, data modeling, testing practices, code review culture, and documentation.
Proactively identify and lead reduction of technical debt in coordination with Engineering Management and Product.
Hands-on Engineering (~20%)
Stay in the code on the most critical work — core platform infrastructure, high-risk migrations, cross-squad technical foundations, and architectural proof-of-concepts.
Review pull requests across sub-squads with depth and speed, giving feedback that helps engineers grow — not just ships.
Set the standard for what good code looks like across Core: observable, testable, maintainable, and scalable.
AI-First Engineering
Champion AI-assisted development across all Core sub-squads — from code generation and test writing to automated documentation and PR reviews.
Collaborate with the AI squad on integrating AI features directly into Core workflows: smart programming suggestions, automated progress summaries, AI-powered onboarding.
Help engineers build practical AI fluency through pairing, demos, and shared tooling workflows.
Mentorship & Team Growth
Mentor and coach engineers across Core sub-squads — raising the technical bar through code reviews, architectural guidance, and technical pairing.
Run regular technical discussions and design reviews that help engineers grow as system thinkers, not just feature builders.
Contribute to hiring across Core: design technical assessments and conduct engineering interviews calibrated to the Core domain.
Cross-functional Collaboration
Be the primary technical voice in product discovery across Core — shaping what's feasible, what's scalable, and what will cause pain six months from now.
Partner closely with Core PMs, BAs, QA Lead, and Design to ensure technical decisions translate cleanly into user-facing product quality.
Align with Tech Leads in other squads (Marketplace, Payment, AI) on shared infrastructure, platform standards, and cross-squad integrations.
Represent Core Engineering in cross-functional leadership discussions, communicating system decisions with clarity to non-technical stakeholders.
requirement:
Must-Have
5+ years of software engineering experience with a strong backend foundation, plus 2+ years in a Tech Lead, Senior Lead, or equivalent technical leadership role.
Deep backend expertise: system architecture, API design, data modeling, async and event-driven processing, performance optimization, and distributed systems.
Solid understanding of frontend engineering (React or similar) — enough to review architecture decisions, guide performance trade-offs, and provide meaningful technical direction to FE engineers.
Solid understanding of mobile engineering (iOS or cross-platform) — enough to assess architectural quality, review technical decisions, and collaborate effectively with mobile engineers.
Comfortable with DevOps fundamentals — CI/CD pipelines, containerization, cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred), and deployment practices — so you can oversee and guide the full delivery lifecycle.
Experience building or scaling complex SaaS products with multiple feature areas — ideally platforms with high user frequency and diverse product surfaces (scheduling, tracking, integrations, notifications).
Proven ability to set and uphold engineering standards across a cross-discipline team — not just within a single stack.
Excellent English communication skills — able to lead technical discussions, write clear architectural decisions, and align non-technical stakeholders on trade-offs.
High ownership mindset: you take problems end-to-end, proactively surface risks, and drive them to resolution.
AI-first engineering mindset: you actively use AI tools to work smarter and help your team do the same.
Nice to Have
Hands-on production experience across multiple disciplines — shipped both backend and mobile or frontend features in the same product.
Familiarity with our stack: Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, React.js, iOS (Swift) — or equivalent experience with comparable technologies.
Experience building domain-specific engines: scheduling systems, rule engines, workflow automation, or data-heavy tracking features.
Background in fitness tech, health tech, coaching tools, or any high-frequency B2B SaaS product.
Experience working with distributed engineering teams across Vietnam, US, or UK time zones.
Hands-on exposure to AI feature integration — LLM-powered suggestions, AI-assisted workflows, or personalization systems.

Tại MobiFone Solutions, chúng tôi tập trung xây dựng và triển khai các nền tảng số phục vụ Chính phủ và doanh nghiệp lớn, trong các lĩnh vực như: Chính phủ điện tử (eGov), nền tảng dữ liệu & AI, hệ thống doanh nghiệp và các giải pháp tích hợp quy mô lớn.

Tech Lead
đồng hành cùng đội ngũ trong việc thiết kế và triển khai các giải pháp công nghệ thế hệ mới.
Mô tả công việc
Thiết kế, xây dựng kiến trúc microservices có khả năng mở rộng cao, có tính sẵn sàng cao. Phân tích, thiết kế core hệ thống, áp dụng các desgin pattern, thuật toán nâng cao, hiệu suất cao.
