Xây dựng phần mềm với Nodejs, .NET, Reactjs; tích hợp với các giải pháp message queue, streaming data; sử dụng các database solution: Oracle, MongoDB, Postgresql ... cho các bài toán và nghiệp vụ cụ thể, đa dạng.
Chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng và đảm bảo hệ thống xử lý traffic cao, đáp ứng yêu cầu an ninh bảo mật cấp độ 4; đảm bảo các cơ chế monitoring, alerting và observability toàn diện.
Quản lý, xây dựng và mentor đội ngũ backend, frontend trong quá trình xây dựng sản phẩm, cải tiến performance. Thực hiện code review nghiêm ngặt; thiết kế, xây dựng quy trình làm việc, phát triển phần mềm. Mentor đội ngũ, xây dựng best practices

This position will be contracted through Bosch’s external vendor under a one-year agreement.
We are building a Next Gen global workflow platform that powers mission‑critical processes for enterprises - now accelerated by Low‑Code/No‑Code, Citizen Development, and GenAI at the core.
As our Technical Evangelism & Enablement Associate, you turn capabilities into customer outcomes: crafting narratives, demos, and programs that convert curiosity into activation, pilots into migration commitments, and releases into daily habit. You’ll lead workshops, product walkthroughs, and customer councils to accelerate legacy‑to‑Next Gen migration, tighten feedback loops with Product and Engineering, and make end‑users love using our platform every day. Your impact will be visible in adoption growth, migration velocity, and delighted customers at global scale.
Key Responsibilities
1)
Product Storytelling & Technical Content
Turn technical features (GenAI, LCNC, workflow orchestration, governance) into clear value propositions and job-to-be-done narratives.
Create and maintain demo scripts, solution walkthroughs, hands-on videos, PPT narratives, technical datasheets, FAQ, release notes, how-to guides, and customer newsletters.
Build battlecards and enablement decks tailored to IT, business owners, architects, and end-user personas.
2)
Migration & Change Management Programs
Co-design migration playbooks and run product demos, workshops, clinics, and office hours to engage customers on the migration plan.
Coordinate stakeholder mapping, communication plans, training paths, UAT enablement, and success checklists.
Capture feedback, document blockers, and feed insights directly into the backlog and migration tooling roadmap.
3)
Global GTM & Feature Launches
Run launch cycles: messaging, positioning, asset creation, multi-region release orchestration, and customer enablement.
Partner with Product and CS to pilot with lighthouse customers, collect testimonials/case studies, and scale what works.
4)
User Insights & Research
Conduct structured interviews, surveys, usability reviews, and beta programs; synthesize into insight briefs and prioritized recommendations.
Track adoption telemetry with Product Analytics and propose experiments (A/B tests, in-product nudges, guided tours).
5)
Campaigns & Community
Run webinars, how-to series, community events, and knowledge base programs for citizen developers and end users.
Build and nurture customer champions and internal field advocates.

- Có kinh nghiệm quản lý nhóm hoặc quản lý các dự án phức tạp liên quan đến AI là lợi thế
- Chuyên môn:
+ Hiểu biết sâu về các công nghệ AI/ML, Computer Vision

+ Có chuyên môn về quản trị dữ liệu
- Kỹ năng quản lý
+ Kỹ năng lập kế hoạch, tổ chức và quản lý công việc
+ Kỹ năng ra quyết định, giải quyết vấn đề và quản lý xung đột
+ Khả năng truyền cảm hứng cho đội ngũ
- Yêu cầu khác:
+ Hiểu biết về các quy định pháp lý, đạo đức liên quan đến AI
+ Kiến thức về quản trị rủi ro và các tiêu chuẩn ngành

job_title: Trưởng Phòng Giải Pháp Công Nghệ (CRM, ERP, AI)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN TẬP ĐOÀN VNGROUP
location: Tầng 5, Tòa Diamond Flower Tower, Số 1, Hoàng Đạo Thúy, Thanh Xuan, Ha Noi
required_skills: System Architecture, Project Management, Machine Learning, AI, ERP, CRM
job_description:
Xây dựng Hệ sinh thái Dữ liệu Khách hàng: Thiết kế và quản lý hệ thống CRM/CDP tập trung cho toàn tập đoàn, đảm bảo dữ liệu khách hàng được kết nối thông suốt giữa các công ty con (BĐS, F&B, Dịch vụ...).
Ứng dụng AI vào Kinh doanh: Nghiên cứu và triển khai các giải pháp AI (Chatbot thông minh, Predictive Analytics - Phân tích dự báo hành vi mua hàng, Recommendation System) để hỗ trợ đội ngũ kinh doanh chốt sale hiệu quả hơn.
Số hóa quy trình Quản trị: Tối ưu hóa các nền tảng công nghệ hiện có (như 1Office, ERP...) và đề xuất các giải pháp phần mềm mới giúp tinh gọn bộ máy vận hành.
Tham mưu chiến lược: Phân tích xu hướng công nghệ mới và tham mưu cho Ban lãnh đạo các giải pháp công nghệ giúp tối ưu chi phí vận hành và tăng trải nghiệm khách hàng (Customer Journey).
Quản lý dự án: Trực tiếp điều phối các dự án triển khai công nghệ, làm việc với các đối tác/nhà thầu phần mềm và quản lý đội ngũ nhân sự kỹ thuật nội bộ.
requirement:
Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành CNTT, Khoa học máy tính hoặc các chuyên ngành tương đương.
Tối thiểu 5-7 năm vị trí tương đương trong lĩnh vực CNTT/Chuyển đổi số, có kinh nghiệm triển khai các hệ thống lớn cho doanh nghiệp đa ngành lĩnh vực BĐS, công nghệ,..
Am hiểu sâu về kiến trúc hệ thống, CRM, ERP và các nền tảng dữ liệu.
Am hiểu về cấu trúc dữ liệu, kiến trúc hệ thống và có kinh nghiệm thực tiễn trong việc ứng dụng AI/Machine Learning vào quy trình nghiệp vụ.
Có khả năng làm việc chặt chẽ với các đơn vị kinh doanh (Business Champions) để biến nhu cầu nghiệp vụ thành giải pháp công nghệ hiệu quả.
Kỹ năng quản lý rủi ro (đặc biệt là rủi ro về sự kháng cự thay đổi từ nhân sự và dữ liệu phân tán).
Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm triển khai các dự án chuyển đổi số (Digital Transformation).

job_title: UX Specialist (Figma, Adobe XD, A/B Testing)
location: 112 Lý Chính Thắng, Phường Xuân Hòa, Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam, Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: UI-UX, Data Analysis, User Journey Mapping, Adobe XD, Figma, A/B testing
job_description:
Job Summary
The
UX Specialist
is a data-driven advocate for the user, responsible for uncovering deep insights into user behavior and translating them into actionable feedback for the development team. Unlike a generalist designer, this role focuses heavily on
User Research, Usability Testing, and UX Auditing
. You will be the "guardian of quality," ensuring that every feature developed is intuitive, accessible, and solves real user problems.
Position
: team member or team lead
Open level
: from Middle to Senior level
Work location (select 1 of 2 options below):
In Vietnam: HoChiMinh city, central districts
Onsite in Dubai: extremely high benefits, all living costs covered by allowance (accommodation, meals on working days,  transportation)
Working hour
:
9:00 - 18:00 (or flexible to 8:00 - 17:00 depending on policy at the moment)
Monday to Friday
Key Responsibilities
User Research & Discovery:
Plan and conduct qualitative and quantitative research (User interviews, surveys, card sorting, and field studies) to understand user needs and pain points.
Usability Testing:
Lead end-to-end usability testing sessions on prototypes and live products to identify friction points.
UX Auditing & Heuristic Evaluation
: Regularly perform expert reviews of current UI/UX designs to ensure compliance with design principles and accessibility standards (WCAG).
Feedback & Documentation:
Synthesize complex research data into clear, actionable reports. Provide specific, constructive feedback to UI Designers and Developers.
User Journey Mapping
: Create and maintain User Journey Maps, Service Blueprints, and User Flows to visualize the end-to-end experience.
Competitive Analysis
: Monitor industry trends and competitor products to identify opportunities for innovation and improvement.
Validation:
Review implemented features during the UAT (User Acceptance Testing) phase to ensure they meet the defined UX requirements.
requirement:
Requirements & Qualifications
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), Psychology, Computer Science, Design, or a related field.
Experience:
3+ years of experience in UX Research, UX Design, or Product Analysis.
● Portfolio:
A strong portfolio demonstrating your research process, case studies of how your feedback improved a product, and your ability to analyze complex flows.
●
Technical Proficiency:
* Proficiency in design tools like
Figma or Adobe XD
(for wireframing and prototyping).
Experience with research/analytics tools (e.g.,
Hotjar, Mixpanel,Maze, Google Analytics, Usertesting.com
).
Key Skills (Technical)
Research Methodology
: Mastery of various research methods (A/B testing, ethnography, longitudinal studies).
Data Analysis:
Ability to interpret both qualitative feedback (what users say) and quantitative data (what users do).
Information Architecture
: Understanding how to organize content and navigation to be most effective for users.
Prototyping:
Ability to create low-to-mid fidelity wireframes to communicate structural changes quickly.
[optional] Coding (or vibe coding):
Know how to implement an web or mobile application
Soft Skills
Empathy:
The ability to put yourself in the user's shoes and represent their voice within the company.
Communication & Persuasion:
Strong storytelling skills to present findings to stakeholders and the ability to negotiate with Developers/Product Managers.
Critical Thinking
: A sharp eye for detail and the ability to spot logical flaws in a user flow before they reach production.
Constructive Radical Candor:
The ability to give direct, honest feedback to the development team while maintaining a collaborative and positive relationship.
Adaptability:
Comfortable working in an Agile/Scrum environment where priorities can shift quickly.

Quản lý dự án

job_description:

- Quản lý dự án

+ Khởi tạo dự án: Xác định mục tiêu, phạm vi công việc dự án, các nguồn lực dự kiến của dự án, các bên liên quan tương tác đến dự án.

+ Cập nhật tài liệu, bài học kinh nghiệm của dự án.
requirement:

: Tốt nghiệp Đại học (loại Khá trở lên) chuyên ngành CNTT, Điện tử Viễn thông, Khoa học Máy tính, Toán Tin Ứng dụng, Khoa học dữ liệu hoặc tương đương.

:

job_title: Product Analyst ( Business Analyst, Product Owner)
location: Tòa nhà Times Tower, Số 35 Lê Văn Lương, phường Nhân Chính, Ha Noi
required_skills: Business Analysis, Stakeholder management, Product Metrics, Product Owner, PQA, Product Management
job_description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE:
At GEEK Up, a Product Analyst collaborates across the full product lifecycle — from uncovering real user problems, defining solutions, to ensuring the quality of product (including the operations after launching). You’ll work side-by-side with Product Designers & Software Engineers in three core areas of expertise:
Product Discovery – Understand business context, user behaviors, operational pain points to identify problem space & equivalent meaningful opportunities.
Product Definition – Turn insights into measurable product requirements and definitions that align across User, Tech, and Operations perspectives.
Product Operations – Validate and monitor how products perform in development progress and in reality — ensuring technical stability, usability, and business efficiency.
You don’t have to master all three yet — but you should be strong in at least two, and eager to grow in the remaining ones. You’ll gain visibility into real-world product behavior, influence product decisions through data-backed insights, and collaborate with multidisciplinary experts who challenge and grow
with you. It’s a rare opportunity to own the integrity of a product’s performance, not just its functionality.

SCOPE OF WORK:
A Product Analyst at GEEK Up is a multidisciplinary problem-solver who bridges business intent, user needs, and technical feasibility. You ensure every product we build is not only well-designed but also operationally sustainable & technically sound:
Product Discovery
Uncover user problems and operational challenges.
Collect, analyze, and synthesize insights from data, research, and stakeholder interviews.
Translate findings into hypotheses and measurable problem statements.
Product Definition
Collaborate in cross-functional squads to define product scope and measurable success metrics.
Develop clear and structured product definitions across three dimensions:
❖ User (experience) – usability and journey validation
❖ Tech (system) – technical feasibility, NFR alignment
❖ Ops (business) – operational efficiency and scalability
Document assumptions and criteria for validation (product readiness).
Product Operations
Design and implement test and validation strategies to ensure real-world product performance.
Coordinate regression, integration, and operational tests; identify and track fit gaps.
Monitor product post-launch performance, detect friction points, and propose initiatives for improvement.
requirement:
REQUIREMENTS:
4+ years of experience in Product Owner, Product Analysis, Product Operations or related product management roles.
Hands-on experience in at least two expertise areas above (Prefer Product Definition)
Strong analytical mindset with the ability to connect user needs, business logic, and system workflows.
Able to connect technical validation to product impact, along with deep exposure to how quality is defined beyond bugs — covering usability, business logic, and operational fit.
Proven ability to define measurable criteria for validating product success, quality and give improvement initiatives.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills across multi-disciplinary teams.
Prior experience in the service environment is strongly preferred.
HIRING PROCESS:
To gain a deeper understanding of who you are and to ensure that GEEK Up is the battleground you desire & that you are the missing piece we are seeking, the recruitment process for this position will undergo the following steps:
CV Screening & General Assessment
HR Interview
Expertise interview
Offer Negotiation

location: 244/31 Huỳnh Văn Bánh, phường 11, Ho Chi Minh
required_skills: JavaScript, Golang, CI/CD, Cloud, Java, NestJS
job_description:
SCOPE OF WORK:
As a core member of the Product Backend team, you will coordinate with cross-functional teams in 4 stages of product development, including planning, implementation, deployment, and operations.
Furthermore, if you have experience in—or the ambition for—acting as a Project Lead to mentor and lead a team of 3-4 Junior Backend Engineers, GEEK Up provides the ideal opportunity and environment for you to thrive in this capacity
RESPONSIBILITIES
1. Technical Solution & Client-facing
Work closely with stakeholders to understand business problems and define technical approaches
Propose and present solutions (architecture, system design, trade-offs) to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
Design systems with strong consideration for scalability, performance, security, and cost optimization
Visualize solutions through architecture diagrams, database design, and system flows
2. Backend Development & System Design
Design and develop backend services with clean, maintainable, high-performance code
Define clear system modules and service boundaries
Ensure quality through code reviews and testing (unit/integration)
3. Deployment, DevOps & Infrastructure Ownership
Collaborate with partners’ DevOps/Infrastructure teams to support system deployment across Cloud and/or On-premise environments
Provide deployment guidelines, technical documentation, architecture recommendations, and operational best practices for customer environments
Design and propose CI/CD pipeline approaches, containerization standards, and deployment strategies
Consult and align with partner teams on infrastructure design to ensure:
Scalability & High Availability
Performance Optimization
Reliability & Security
Support implementation planning for monitoring and alerting solutions (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana)
Troubleshoot deployment and production-related issues by identifying root causes and proposing appropriate solutions/workarounds
Act as a technical advisor during deployment and maintenance phases, ensuring partner teams can operate and maintain systems effectively
4. Collaboration & Ownership
Collaborate with Product, Frontend, and cross-functional teams to ensure delivery alignment
Break down solutions into execution plans and drive delivery
(Optional) Mentor junior engineers or lead a small team
requirement:
WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:
To start your adventure at our Product Backend team, you should have
Bachelor Degree in Computer Science or any related fields.
4–7 years of experience in Backend Development (
Java
, Golang, NodeJS, NestJS, Python, TypeScript, etc.)
Strong experience in system/architecture design for production systems
Ability to propose and communicate technical solutions from ambiguous requirements
Solid understanding of data flow, database design, and system design
Hands-on experience with:
Cloud / On-premise deployment
CI/CD and Docker
Monitoring and performance optimization
Strong system thinking, problem-solving skills, and ownership mindset
Nice to have:
Experience in client-facing or technical consulting roles
Experience in leading features/projects or mentoring engineers

ITviec's client is looking for a visionary and battle-tested

Ensure uptime and reliability of MT4/MT5 trading platforms
Design scalable monitoring and alerting systems
Drive incident response and root-cause analysis

Strengthen system security and access controls

job_description:
Welcome to SMG Vietnam!
SMG Swiss Marketplace Group simplifies lives with innovative online marketplaces in Automotive, Real Estate, General Marketplaces, and Finance & Insurance. As SMG’s innovation hub, SMG Vietnam develops cutting-edge solutions in a collaborative, empowering environment. Recognized among the 2023 Asia & Vietnam Best Workplaces, we attract top digital talent to create exceptional user experiences for Switzerland. Guided by our core values—Better Together, Aim High, and Act Responsibly—we drive innovation and meaningful change.
This job refers to our Real Estate brands,
and , the largest real estate portals in Switzerland, with more than 15 million visits per month and more than 100,000 listings.
We provide all users looking for a property with a transparent overview of the entire range of listings without them having to tediously visit different platforms. In addition to great products such as the mortgage or price calculator, we also offer editorial articles on topics such as housing and financing.

We are looking for a
Senior Full stack Engineer for the Developer Experience (DevX) Team at SMG Real Estate, with a strong Frontend background.
DevX is responsible for providing both the tools our development teams use to manage the lifecycle of our product and the experience of using them. You will get to collaborate and access the wealth of knowledge and experience from a community of amazing engineers who come from all parts of the globe and are ready to share their expertise and aid you in your path to fulfilling your potential.

Join our dynamic team, located in six countries (Switzerland, Serbia, Vietnam, France, Germany, and India), where creativity thrives. Together, we tackle challenges, celebrate successes, and keep learning and growing.

Your Mission:
Work with our engineers to understand the challenges they face and how to improve their experience.
Leverage your own knowledge and experience to help understand how to deliver the best engineering platform and tooling, improving the productivity and satisfaction of our teams.
Help define processes, frameworks, and best practices for development.
Support DevX’s Frontend engineers and work together with our Frontend Guild to understand our needs, develop a vision of how to best support them and deliver it as part of our Engineering Platform.
Your responsibilities will evolve as we grow.
requirement:
Strong English communication skills.
At least 5 years of experience with TypeScript, either in front or back end.
2+ years of experience in frontend development with frameworks such as Vue and/or React.
2+ years of experience with serverless event-driven microservice architectures implemented using AWS Lambda.
Experience implementing pipelines using GitHub Actions
Experience implementing tests, both for front and back end.
Motivated to help engineers be more productive and have the best possible developer experience.
Nice-to-Have Qualifications:
Previous experience in Developer Experience or Platform Engineering.
Experience maintaining libraries and tooling, for example, frontend component libraries or CDK constructs.
Experience or interest in integrating AI into engineering stacks.
We value the skills you bring and your ability to learn quickly, so don’t worry if your career path has been unique.
